title: U.S. and Iran sign initial deal to end war and open Strait of Hormuz
description: The president defended the agreement, but it has been criticized as a return to the pre-war status quo, with the toughest negotiations still to come.

title: How the stock market became Trump’s most favored adviser
description: Trump has increasingly treated the stock market as a real-time referendum on his presidency, citing market gains as justification for many consequential decisions.

title: Sen. Elissa Slotkin on intel chief's confirmation hearing and election integrity
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep talks to Democratic Sen. Elissa Slotkin of Michigan about the fight over the confirmation of a new national intelligence director, the renewal of spy tools and election integrity.

title: The Obama Presidential Center will be dedicated Thursday. Here's what to expect
description: The Obama Presidential Center's grand opening ceremony will be a star-studded event. The center's museum highlights the legacy of the former president, but it is not a traditional presidential library.

title: What — and who — will be at the Great American State Fair? Here's a primer
description: Several state governments have declined to participate in the 16-day event, though organizers say all U.S. states and territories will be represented by booths on the National Mall.

title: Poll: Most Americans have the summer blues about Trump and the economy
description: A new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll finds a record low share of Americans approve of President Trump's job performance and his handling of the economy heading into the summer before a key midterm election.

title: Trump delays intel chief's confirmation in an attempt to advance voting bill
description: President Trump is causing headaches for Senate Republicans once again -- this time over his pick for director of national intelligence.

title: How Republicans are reacting to Trump's attempt to leverage confirmation hearing
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with political strategist Rina Shah about congressional Republicans' reactions to President Trump's efforts to tie Jay Clayton's confirmation to unrelated legislation.

title: Senate targets Hegseth’s travel in standoff over apparent Iran school attack, boat strikes
description: Frustrated lawmakers are increasing pressure on the defense secretary to get answers they’ve sought for months.

title: Trump defends his Iran deal, criticizes longtime ally Israel as G-7 ends
description: In a sprawling news conference at the G-7 summit in France, the president touted the economic benefits of the ceasefire and threatened force if it fails.

title: Georgia GOP drops redistricting plan that would hurt Black representation
description: Gov. Brian Kemp had called a special session so Republicans could secure one or more additional House seats in the 2028 elections. But lawmakers pulled the plug.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: Trump says intelligence chief pick’s hearing is off and Pulte will remain for now
description: The Senate postponed the hearing after Trump derailed the process. Sen. Tom Cotton said the president directed Jay Clayton, the DNI nominee, not to appear.

title: The Supreme Court’s major cases during the 2025-26 term
description: The Supreme Court has taken up Trump-related cases in its new term, as well as cases dealing with gay and transgender issues and campaigns.

title: Trump touts preliminary deal to end the war with Iran in press conference
description: President Trump gave a wide-ranging press conference Wednesday at the end of the G7 summit where he tackled questions about his tentative agreement with Iran.

title: Here's how much the Iran war cost -- and how its effects will linger
description: More than three months after the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, the costs and aftereffects are felt around the world.

title: What Wisconsin swing voters say about Trump, the Iran war and America at 250
description: Swing voters from Wisconsin share their thoughts on the Iran war, high prices and how they're feeling about America at its 250th year marker.

title: After draping White House in gold, Trump heads to ‘the real deal’: Versailles
description: The president was set to leave France — until he was invited to the palace that has inspired his construction projects, including the White House ballroom.

title: Four takeaways from primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Oklahoma
description: Trump-endorsed candidates won Senate runoffs in Georgia and Alabama, but in a rare defeat, the president’s pick for Georgia governor failed to advance.

title: Senate postpones confirmation hearing for intel chief after Trump's call to delay
description: Senators wanted to fast-track President Trump's pick for Director of National Intelligence. But Trump now says he wants to delay until they pass voting legislation that already failed in the Senate.

title: Five arrested, charged with plotting to attack UFC event at White House, DOJ says
description: Officials alleged that plotters discussed sending explosive-loaded drones to the event and shooting people who fled.

title: South Carolina GOP isn’t sold on Trump’s candidate. He may endorse a second.
description: An endorsement of both candidates would be the latest example of the president hedging his bets to avoid a fight with conservative activists.
